title: Tensura: Awakened
description: This is an addon for the tensura: reincarnated mod. It aims to add stuff from different media while maintaining some form of balance.
body:
This is an addon for the tensura reincarnated mod. It aims to add content from media other then tensura while maintaining a semblance of balance. This mod also adds some fun features/mechanic like, Soul bound items and the fear mechanic. The wiki will be located in the official discord server.

## Credits
I wanna give some huge credits to @sleep_enjoyer. on discord for thinking of ideas. I also wanna credit @memoires and @minheragon on discord for answering some of my questions. Credits to @justfirefr for the system icon. I also wanna credit @corelegends for helping with some coding.

## Disclaimer
I'm not planning on further updating this mod besides one more skill. Anything in the mod will be put in my next big project, Awakene Archives.

Tensura: Reincarnated
[https://modrinth.com/mod/tensura-reincarnated](https://modrinth.com/mod/tensura-reincarnated)
